response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role: deep JVM expertise, Kotlin, Spring ecosystem, and IDE internals. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms work years ago) and there is no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed. The closest IDE-adjacent experience is C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago, which doesn't translate to JVM tooling.
strengths: Strong track record on complex, large-scale systems across multiple domains
Prior IDE-adjacent experience contributing C/C++ components to NI LabWindows/CVI
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, public talks
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
Kotlin is entirely absent; Java exposure is minimal and dated
Primary recent stack is TypeScript/Node and DLang, not JVM tooling
